subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down from before the Throne unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and who hath perceived the fragrance of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من لدی العرش الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و وجد عرف الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @being a source of light; guidance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @suffering and imprisonment
